# Pull Request

## Description

Provide a brief description of the changes in this PR.

## Related Issue

Fixes #(issue number)

Or if no issue exists:

- Describe why this change is needed

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test coverage improvement
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] CI/CD improvement

## Changes Made

Provide a detailed list of changes:

- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Testing

Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes:

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`make test` or `pytest`)
- [ ] Added new tests for new functionality
- [ ] Manual testing performed (describe below)
- [ ] Tested on multiple Python versions (if relevant)

**Test Details**:

```bash
# Commands you ran
pytest tests/...
```

## Code Quality Checks

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines (PEP 8, ruff)
- [ ] Type hints added/updated (`mypy` passes)
- [ ] Docstrings added/updated (100% coverage maintained)
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass (`pre-commit run --all-files`)
- [ ] All CI checks pass

**Pre-commit Output** (if any issues):

```
# Paste output here if there were any issues
```

## Documentation

- [ ] README.md updated (if public API changed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for user-facing changes)
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md updated (if workflow changed)
- [ ] docstrings updated/added (for code changes)
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic

## Breaking Changes

If this PR introduces breaking changes, describe them here and provide migration guidance:

- Breaking change 1: ...
- Migration: ...

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots to demonstrate UI changes or new features.

## Performance Impact

Describe any performance implications of your changes:

- [ ] No performance impact
- [ ] Performance improvement (describe and show benchmarks if possible)
- [ ] Potential performance regression (explain why acceptable)

## Security Considerations

- [ ] No security implications
- [ ] Security improvement (describe)
- [ ] Reviewed for security vulnerabilities

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the PR here.

## Reviewer Notes

Any specific areas you'd like reviewers to focus on?

- Review focus area 1
- Review focus area 2
